webview.notes: Big update: open links from other apps, tabs restored across restarts, file uploads, camera/mic/location prompts, zoom, remote media keys, voice search, SSL/login prompts, external-app links, long-press link/image menu, gamepad cursor, configurable cursor speed + direct D-pad mode, smoother scrolling, and an in-app downloads screen. GeckoView engine removed (slimmer, single WebView engine).
